violations.description: Factory uses randomUUID for isolation tokens; this can make reruns less reproducible without a captured seed.
violations.suggestion: Allow optional seeded token override while keeping random default for collision avoidance.

violations.description: Default correlation/csrf IDs use randomUUID which can complicate exact replay diagnostics.
violations.suggestion: Expose deterministic override hooks for replay-focused debugging runs.

recommendations: Expose optional deterministic seed inputs in Story E4 context factory for debug/replay runs
Keep random defaults for parallel collision safety and document deterministic overrides
summary: Determinism is strong in executable E4 tests; only low-severity reproducibility caveats exist in factory randomness used for isolation.
